title: hemizonia corymbosa var. barclayi
intro: Hemizonia corymbosa var. barclayi, also known as Barclay's tarweed, is a variety of the Hemizonia corymbosa plant, a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hemizonia corymbosa var. barclayi include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
